name: Diane von Furstenberg
subject: I hope you’ll love this shirt
body:
The new shirt I've designed: | Friend --

When I think about this election, I think what it will mean for young girls all over the country to know they can grow up to be anything they dream. And what it will mean for women and girls everywhere to have a president like Hillary in the White House fighting for them every single day!

I’m proudly supporting Hillary, so I was thrilled when Anna Wintour asked me to design a shirt for the Made for History collection. The shirt I designed -- as well as a beautiful new shirt by Eva Fehren -- are available in the Shop today. **I hope you will choose one that expresses your style -- it will definitely show your support, since all proceeds benefit Hillary and Democrats across the country:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Growing up, my mother taught me that fear is not an option. She also taught me to be proud to be a woman. That is something I admire in Hillary -- she is proud of who she is, and she doesn’t let anyone make her afraid. No matter what stands in her way, she stays true to herself and her belief that we all deserve a chance to succeed.

I’m so grateful you’re part of this team. Together, we’re going to make history.

Love,

Diane

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to support her and Democrats across the country:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)** Paid for by Hillary Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Hillary for America, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AR, CO, FL, GA, ID, IN, KY, LA, ME, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NH, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, TN, TX, UT, VA, WV, WI, and WY.

**Contributions or gifts to Hillary Victory Fund are not tax deductible.** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 1366, Merrifield, VA 22116-9559 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0NDAzMDQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMzg3NzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: A very important primary tomorrow
body:
#
West Virginia votes tomorrow, and this primary matters, sisters and brothers. A lot.
If we are able to win in West Virginia tomorrow, not only would we cut further into Secretary Clinton's lead, but it will send a powerful message to the Democratic Party establishment about an issue at the heart of our campaign in that state: poverty.
When Bernie talks about transformational change in this country, he is talking about the millions of Americans who live in poverty, who have been tossed out, left behind, and abandoned by the rich and the powerful. People like those in McDowell County, West Virginia, where he visited last week.
So let's go out and win this primary tomorrow, because doing so will send an unmistakable message that our political revolution demands more than incremental change. We want an economy that works for all of us, not just the 1 percent. But we need your help to get there:
[**Your $2.70 contribution before West Virginia votes will help us win an important state and send a powerful message that you demand a campaign for transformational change from the Democratic Party 's nominee.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia?refcode=em160509-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia?refcode=em160509-s1-full")
Eight years ago, Hillary Clinton won West Virginia with 67 percent of the vote. She beat Barack Obama by 41 points. But we are doing very well, precisely because Bernie is willing to tell the truth about the issues facing working families across the this country, and what is required to change course.
If we continue to stand together and fight, I believe that we will win tomorrow.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia?refcode=em160509-s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/west-virginia?refcode=em160509-s1-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Shelby Cole, RussFeingold.com
subject: Two peas in a pod
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
These two would weaken the safety net for those who need it most. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428c/1c469400/50deb7b/3562f55/676794604/VEsH/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema") Friend, They're two peas in a pod. Speaker of the House Paul Ryan and our opponent, Senator Ron Johnson, share the same dream: to slash Social Security and turn Medicare into a voucher program. If they had their way, Speaker Ryan and our opponent, Senator Johnson, would weaken the safety net for millions of Americans. [**We need to stand together in support of Social Security and Medicare for American seniors. If you agree, add your name.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428c/1c469400/50deb7b/3562f55/676794604/VEsE/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428c/1c469400/50deb7b/3562f55/676794604/VEsF/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema") Medicare and Social Security are a promise we've made to our seniors -- that if you work hard all your life, you'll be able to retire with dignity. Speaker Ryan and Senator Johnson would rather give tax breaks to big corporations and the wealthiest Americans by slashing Social Security and Medicare, forcing our seniors to carry the burden. [**Help us send a message to Ron Johnson, Speaker Ryan and all Republican extremists: We need to strengthen and expand -- not slash -- Medicare and Social Security.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428c/1c469400/50deb7b/3562f55/676794604/VEsC/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema") Maybe if these two hit the trail to actually listen to Wisconsin's seniors, they'd hear what Russ has been hearing: that it's getting harder and harder to make ends meet, and that programs like Social Security and Medicare are absolutely critical for Wisconsin's seniors. Thanks for standing with us. Best, Shelby Cole
Email Director | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428c/1c469400/50deb7b/3562f55/676794604/VEsD/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/soc-sec?utm_source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&source=ema_2016-05-09_socsec&utm_campaign=socsec&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428c/1c469400/50deb7b/3562f52/676794604/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-11_advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428c/1c469400/50deb7b/3562f53/676794604/VEsB/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/advocacy-optout"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428c/1c469400/50deb7b/3562f50/676794604/VEsO/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf428c/1c469400/50deb7b/3562f51/676794604/VEsP/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer

If they had their way, Speaker Ryan and our opponent, Senator Johnson, would weaken the safety net for millions of Americans. name: Austin Chambers
subject: Tomorrow's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
I wanted to drop you a quick note to let you know that Eric is participating in a televised debate tomorrow at 7:00pm. Supporters will be tuning in from all over the state, and you're invited to join in on the action.
Eric is the only candidate in this race who has never run for office, so this debate will be another great opportunity to discuss how a conservative outsider can shake-up Jefferson City. Our team is hosting watch parties across Missouri, and we hope you can join us to enjoy the debate and make calls.
**Springfield -- 6:00pm**
2740 S. Glenstone Ave, Suite 202
Springfield, MO 65804
[RSVP](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabakVDzy2nY5C2rNUqMCS8al-2FsdA0647iVzVSA8-2Fc755JXiMY1-2FM4Yel26WTyFeFREreIRNEDzQ3jdpkPFU-2B3UHqnOkkBcxTPRaVKGk1z7eEUZ8hQ4BYJ7n0yivtOl8Tg1Ng-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23zVQZEadtybTcCRuQ8ZBNPM2XyXfnmvuGTjE8e91MSlcpwe01PRrVrjSKTevBVShH5VbAMBtxQdUeLIN0X-2BZF4oVpFkdcuWYp-2F8ixKxJ7CT4KHwm6svb-2BU-2F9k0JoVQb7LRaG3-2FRaWaDyvw-2FKBI7b2JnaRoGS7kIGXFzw6fBW8J9gkJ4OV-2BgvUs-2FuZwmGa1FOnliElg8wz6-2B8iHGMpJ26AHwYbCY8iHSFyFxJ459KunTJ8ZgzamPgU4Byqax5sd3g99DbeV1Xshy0ZHihX73OeVY4QZHkGIdvWiua4Yyh9XyOyTy1zrZL3aps-2BfJUW3vorkiWN1Ku6exeFIWYxWu4AU5NsNE-2BLHi-2FusFYyg51yR0Cd3SDEZE7uPA-2B-2BmI5rMFJ9XeHpe8ckK07STwbc58M3fB)

If you're unable to make it to the watch parties, then be sure to tune in from home. The debate will be broadcasted live on KOZL (My Network TV) in the Springfield region from 7:00 pm - 8:00 pm. It will also broadcast on KNSF (NBC) and KODE (ABC) in the Joplin area, and KQTV (ABC) in St. Joseph. If you don't have any of those channels, then you can live stream the debate online [here](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=K1q7aUCk5jmHu07xO2zzAiJOYx1xiycinyM6PKXY4vznGr3DTJWSkm8buf2YyuA3llxDNnmVzkuArzR9JqvWSAC93mRmQaSb-2FDrzLqVqBeW8ZiNKN-2BhhteVQe1B29DNw_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23zVQZEadtybTcCRuQ8ZBNPM2XyXfnmvuGTjE8e91MSlcpwe01PRrVrjSKTevBVShH5VbAMBtxQdUeLIN0X-2BZF4oVpFkdcuWYp-2F8ixKxJ7CT4KHwm6svb-2BU-2F9k0JoVQb7LRaG3-2FRaWaDyvw-2FKBI7b2JnaRoGS7kIGXFzw6fBW8J9gkJ4OV-2BgvUs-2FuZwmGa1FOnmNRYCUvCSGBkJQYiV3MIuAcaV7pye-2BWZPf3B6bvLCr4pjy3v684YC4AVbEJMwB5Qou33dQ95j6-2BhkgU32Wz27S8x4rUgZQbNVeRNAI6EIVNYLdpDAVaqOsTtAQFDO1ZHDkAbWvpS6y2N-2BzDqZ-2BbrzebYyxNvh5NHBudCVbb5UNiK5QcYjjW3rJ9ala2TVkzeV5LRGQoQP-2BM2JY9iSXQz14).

clean_body: Peter, I wanted to drop you a quick note to let you know that Eric is participating in a televised debate tomorrow at 7:00pm. Supporters will be tuning in from all over the state, and you're invited to join in on the action. Eric is the only candidate in this race who has never run for office, so this debate will be another great opportunity to discuss how a conservative outsider can shake-up Jefferson City. Our team is hosting watch parties across Missouri, and we hope you can join us to enjoy the debate and make calls. Springfield -- 6:00pm 2740 S. Glenstone Ave, Suite 202 Springfield, MO 65804 Crestwood -- 6:00pm 9815 Watson Rd St. Louis, MO 63126 Kansas City -- 6:30pm Nick and Jake's 5031 Main St Kansas City, MO 64112 Columbia -- 6:30pm 913 E Ash Street Columbia, MO 65202 If you're unable to make it to the watch parties, then be sure to tune in from home. The debate will be broadcasted live on KOZL (My Network TV) in the Springfield region from 7:00 pm - 8:00 pm. It will also broadcast on KNSF (NBC) and KODE (ABC) in the Joplin area, and KQTV (ABC) in St. Joseph. If you don't have any of those channels, then you can live stream the debate online . Be sure to tune in tomorrow! Thanks, AC Austin Chambers Campaign Manager Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer 4579 Laclede Avenue #138 -- St. Louis, Missouri 63108

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I’m PUMPED about this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Here comes the general | Friend --

Happy Monday! I am PUMPED to be sending this email, because it’s time to start talking about my two favorite words:

Battleground states.

If we want to beat Donald Trump, we’re going to have to run a smart general election campaign all across the country, with a special focus on states that have historically swung red or blue -- places like Ohio, Colorado, and Florida -- as well as states that have grown more progressive over the past decade.

To win these states and therefore win the White House, we need to build enormous volunteer organizations to talk to voters and get them out to the polls when the time comes. And building those volunteer organizations starts right now as we open offices and hire staff in our most important targeted states -- the staff who will be on the front lines in a historic campaign with the once-in-a-lifetime responsibility of preventing a Donald Trump presidency.

**[We’re launching a brand new Battleground Fund today to support our work in these states. Chip in now to become a founding donor, and we’ll send you a free sticker.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

** We’re deploying experienced leaders to build out our teams in each of these states, so please believe we’re going to find every last potential Hillary voter and talk to them about how we’re going to break down the barriers that hold Americans back. That’s the kind of organizing that helped us win 25 contests (and counting!) during this primary -- it’s what will take us to victory in November, too.

But launching a nationwide campaign takes serious resources. That means we need all the help we can get from Hillary’s best supporters like you, and we need it now.

**If you’re ready to build the operation we’ll need to win in November, will you chip in to become a founding donor of our brand new Battleground Fund? We’re looking for 14 donations from your area today to kick this thing off right:** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you -- let’s do this!!

Marlon

Marlon Marshall
Director of State and Political Engagement
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [ | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU0NDU5ODcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxNDM0OTQ2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
